sections.title: 1. Introduction
content: CodeX Club ('CodeX', 'we', 'our', or 'us') is the official technical student club operating under Quantum University. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our website, register for membership, participate in events, or interact with our services.
By accessing or using the CodeX website, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
content: Depending on the services you use, we may collect the following information.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
content: The information collected through our website is used only for legitimate club operations and administrative purposes.
list: Generate certificates and event boarding passes.
Respond to support requests and inquiries.
Improve website functionality and user experience.
Protect the platform from misuse and unauthorized access.
Comply with applicable university policies and legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Authentication & Cookies
content: The administrative section of the website uses secure email and password authentication. Passwords are never stored in plain text and are securely hashed using industry-standard cryptographic hashing algorithms.

The website uses JSON Web Tokens (JWT) stored in secure cookies to authenticate authorized administrators. These cookies are essential for maintaining secure login sessions and protecting administrative resources.

Our website does not use advertising or marketing cookies. Essential authentication cookies are required for certain website functionality and disabling them may prevent administrators from accessing protected features.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
content: To provide reliable services, we integrate trusted third-party platforms that process limited information required for their functionality.
list: Cloudflare Turnstile – Protection against spam and automated bot submissions.
Nodemailer – Sending official emails and notifications.
GitHub – Source code management and version control.

sections.title: 6. Membership & Payment Information
content: CodeX Club currently charges a membership fee of ₹50. Payments may be accepted either online or offline depending on the registration process.

For online payments, only the transaction reference or payment identifier is collected for verification purposes. We do not collect, process, or store your debit card, credit card, banking credentials, UPI PIN, passwords, or other sensitive financial information.
Offline cash payments are recorded only for administrative verification.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
content: Membership records, registration details, certificates, and participation history may be retained indefinitely for administrative, historical, alumni engagement, audit, and certificate verification purposes.
Security logs may be retained for a limited period to monitor unauthorized access attempts and improve platform security.
Information may be removed or anonymized where required by applicable laws or university policies.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
content: We implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
list: Security middleware and HTTP protection headers.
Rate limiting to reduce malicious requests.

sections.title: 9. User Rights
content: Subject to applicable laws and university regulations, you may request assistance regarding your personal information.
list: Request access to your personal information.
Request updates to your contact information.
Request clarification regarding how your data is used.
Contact the club regarding privacy-related concerns.

sections.title: 10. Children's Privacy
content: The CodeX website is primarily intended for students of Quantum University. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children in violation of applicable laws. If such information is identified, reasonable steps will be taken to remove it.

sections.title: 11. External Links
content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, resources, or platforms. We are not responsible for the privacy practices, security, or content of external websites. Users should review the privacy policies of those websites before providing personal information.

sections.title: 12. Policy Updates
content: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our services, legal requirements, or university policies. The latest version will always be published on the CodeX website along with the updated revision date.
Your continued use of the website after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 13. Contact Us
content: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal information, please contact us.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content: Welcome to the official website of CodeX Club, the technical student club operating under Quantum University. By accessing, browsing, registering, or using this website, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions.
If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you should discontinue using the website immediately.

sections.title: 2. About CodeX Club
content: CodeX Club is an official student technical club of Quantum University that organizes workshops, hackathons, coding competitions, seminars, technical sessions, and community activities for students.
This website serves as the official platform for memberships, event registrations, announcements, certificates, and other club-related services.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility
content: Certain services provided through this website are intended primarily for students of Quantum University.
Some events may also be open to students from other colleges or institutions when explicitly announced by the organizers.
The club reserves the right to determine participant eligibility for any event or membership.

sections.title: 4. User Responsibilities
content: Users are responsible for ensuring that all information submitted through the website is accurate, complete, and up to date.

Providing false, misleading, or fraudulent information may result in rejection of registrations, cancellation of participation, suspension of membership, or permanent restriction from future activities.

sections.title: 5. Membership
content: Membership is subject to verification by CodeX Club.
The club currently charges a membership fee of ₹50, which may be collected either online or offline depending on the registration process.
Membership approval is not automatic and remains subject to verification by authorized club administrators.

sections.title: 6. Event Registration
content: Participants must complete the registration process before the announced deadline.
Late registrations may not be accepted unless specifically permitted by the organizing team.
Certain events may require active membership while others may be open to all eligible students.

sections.title: 7. Payments & Refund Policy
content: Membership fees and event registration fees, where applicable, are generally non-refundable.
Refunds will only be considered when explicitly announced by CodeX Club or required by applicable law.
Users are responsible for ensuring that payment details and transaction references submitted during registration are accurate.

sections.title: 8. Team Participation
content: Certain competitions and hackathons may require team participation.
Team formation, member limits, substitutions, and eligibility requirements shall be governed by the rules published for the respective event.
Team substitutions after registration may be permitted only with approval from the organizing committee.

sections.title: 9. Certificates
content: Participation certificates, appreciation certificates, and other recognitions may be issued for eligible events.
Participants must satisfy the attendance and participation requirements specified for the event.
The club reserves the right to withhold certificates where eligibility requirements are not fulfilled.

sections.title: 10. Code of Conduct
content: All participants are expected to maintain professional, respectful, and ethical behavior throughout club activities.
Harassment, discrimination, abusive language, cheating, plagiarism, disruptive conduct, or any behavior that negatively impacts other participants or organizers will not be tolerated.

sections.title: 11. Intellectual Property
content: Unless otherwise stated, all website content including logos, graphics, designs, documents, certificates, event materials, branding, and published resources are the intellectual property of CodeX Club or their respective owners.
Users may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or commercially use website content without prior written permission.

sections.title: 12. Acceptable Use
content: Users agree not to misuse the website or interfere with its normal operation.
list: Do not submit malicious files or harmful code.
Do not engage in fraudulent activities.

sections.title: 13. Account Security
content: Administrative accounts are protected using secure authentication mechanisms.
Authorized administrators are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials and reporting any suspected unauthorized access.

sections.title: 14. Suspension & Termination
content: CodeX Club reserves the right to suspend, reject, or terminate memberships, registrations, or access to club services if these Terms are violated.
Serious misconduct, fraudulent activities, repeated violations, or actions damaging to the club or university community may result in permanent restrictions.

sections.title: 15. Event Modifications
content: The organizing committee reserves the right to modify event schedules, venues, formats, eligibility criteria, judging processes, prizes, speakers, or timelines whenever necessary.
Reasonable efforts will be made to communicate significant updates through official channels.

sections.title: 16. Limitation of Liability
content: While reasonable efforts are made to ensure the availability and accuracy of website content, CodeX Club does not guarantee uninterrupted access or error-free operation.

The club shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of this website or participation in club activities, except where prohibited by applicable law.

sections.title: 17. Disclaimer
content: Information published on this website is provided for general informational purposes only.
Although every effort is made to maintain accurate and current information, CodeX Club does not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of every page at all times.
Official announcements issued by CodeX Club or Quantum University shall take precedence where differences exist.

sections.title: 18. Governing Rules
content: These Terms & Conditions shall be interpreted in accordance with the applicable laws of India and the policies, rules, and regulations of Quantum University.

sections.title: 19. Changes to These Terms
content: CodeX Club may revise these Terms & Conditions periodically to reflect operational, legal, or policy changes.
The latest version will always be published on the official website together with the updated revision date.

sections.title: 20. Contact Information
content: For questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact CodeX Club.

sections.title: 1. Our Commitment
content: CodeX Club is committed to providing an accessible and inclusive digital experience for students, members, faculty, and visitors. We continuously work to improve the usability and accessibility of our website so that it can be accessed by as many people as possible.

sections.title: 2. Accessibility Features
list: Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Alternative text for meaningful images wherever applicable.

sections.title: 3. Browser Compatibility
content: The website is designed to work with modern versions of major web browsers including Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Mozilla Firefox, Safari, and other standards-compliant browsers.

sections.title: 4. Continuous Improvement
content: Accessibility is an ongoing effort. As new features are added to the website, we continue reviewing and improving accessibility to provide a better experience for all users.

sections.title: 5. Report Accessibility Issues
content: If you encounter an accessibility issue or have suggestions for improvement, please contact CodeX Club. Your feedback helps us improve the website for everyone.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
content: CodeX Club aims to create a welcoming, respectful, and collaborative technical community where students can learn, innovate, and grow together. These guidelines apply to all club activities, events, workshops, competitions, official communication channels, and social media interactions.

sections.title: 2. Respect Everyone
list: Treat everyone with respect and professionalism.
Be inclusive regardless of background, experience, or skill level.
Respect organizers, volunteers, speakers, mentors, and participants.

sections.title: 4. Unacceptable Behaviour
list: Sharing offensive, illegal, or inappropriate content.

sections.title: 5. Online Conduct
content: Members and participants are expected to maintain respectful behaviour while interacting through official CodeX Club communication channels and social media platforms.
list: Avoid spam or repetitive promotional content.
Respect privacy when sharing photographs or content.

sections.title: 6. Team Participation
content: Many competitions involve teamwork. Team members should collaborate honestly, contribute fairly, and communicate respectfully throughout the event.

sections.title: 7. Event Participation
content: Participants should arrive on time, follow organizer instructions, and maintain academic integrity during all technical activities.

sections.title: 8. Reporting Issues
content: Members are encouraged to report inappropriate behaviour or policy violations to CodeX Club organizers. Reports will be reviewed fairly and confidentially wherever possible.

sections.title: 9. Consequences
content: Violation of these Community Guidelines may result in warnings, removal from an event, cancellation of certificates, suspension of membership, or restrictions from future CodeX Club activities depending on the severity of the violation.

sections.title: 1. Eligibility
content: Eligibility requirements vary depending on the event. Some events are exclusive to registered CodeX Club members, while others may be open to all students of Quantum University or invited institutions.

sections.title: 2. Registration
list: Complete registration before the announced deadline.
One registration per participant unless otherwise stated.
Late registrations may not be accepted.

sections.title: 3. Event Fees
content: Events may be free or paid depending on the event announcement. Registration is considered complete only after any required payment has been successfully verified.

sections.title: 4. Refund Policy
content: Unless explicitly announced otherwise, registration fees and membership fees are non-refundable.

sections.title: 5. Attendance
content: Participants are expected to attend the event according to the published schedule. Attendance may be mandatory for receiving participation certificates or other recognitions.

sections.title: 6. Team Events
content: For team-based competitions, participants must follow the announced team size and eligibility requirements.
list: Teams violating eligibility rules may be disqualified.
Each participant may join only one team unless otherwise permitted.

sections.title: 7. Participant Responsibilities
list: Maintain fair play and academic integrity.
Protect event equipment and venue property.

sections.title: 8. Code of Conduct
content: Participants must maintain respectful and professional behaviour throughout the event. Any misconduct may result in immediate disciplinary action.

sections.title: 10. Event Changes
content: CodeX Club reserves the right to modify schedules, venues, speakers, judges, prizes, event formats, timelines, or other arrangements whenever necessary. Any significant updates will be communicated through official channels.

sections.title: 11. Photography & Media
content: Photographs and videos may be captured during CodeX Club events for documentation, promotional activities, social media, and official club publications. By participating, attendees consent to the use of such media unless they notify organizers in advance where practical.

sections.title: 12. Certificates
content: Certificates will only be issued to eligible participants who satisfy the attendance and participation requirements announced for the respective event.

sections.title: 13. Organizer Decisions
content: All decisions made by CodeX Club organizers regarding registrations, eligibility, judging, prizes, certificates, participation, and disciplinary matters shall be considered final.

sections.title: 14. Contact
content: For questions regarding any CodeX Club event, please contact us.
